# Villa Mira Kalkan

> Private luxury villa in Kalkan, Turkey — 4 bedrooms, up to 8 guests, heated infinity pool with panoramic Aegean sea views.

## About

Villa Mira Kalkan is a privately owned luxury holiday villa set on the green hillsides above Kalkan, on Turkey's Turquoise Coast (Antalya province). The villa is designed to blend into its natural surroundings of ancient olive trees and Mediterranean landscape.

## Key Details

- **Capacity:** 4 en-suite bedrooms, up to 8 guests
- **Pool:** Heated private infinity pool, open from sunrise, panoramic bay views
- **Location:** Kalkan, Kaş — Antalya, Turkey (Turkish Riviera / Turquoise Coast)
- **Distances:** ~20 km from Kaş, ~80 km from Antalya Airport (AYT)
- **Minimum stay:** 7 nights (peak season)
- **Languages:** English, Turkish, Russian

## Amenities

- Private heated infinity pool with Aegean sea views
- Multiple sea-view terraces
- Ancient olive garden and Mediterranean landscaping
- Full professional kitchen
- Dedicated concierge (boat charters, restaurant reservations)
- Private gated parking for 2 vehicles (24/7 monitored)
- High-speed fibre WiFi throughout
- Individual air conditioning in all rooms
- Smart TVs (Netflix, Apple TV+, satellite)
- No airport transfer service provided

## Contact

- **Website:** https://villamirakalkan.com
- **Email:** villamirakalkan@gmail.com
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +90 534 979 13 70
